summary: MEGA PROMPT #27: Live Operations & Market Readiness - Complete testing of all 11 operations endpoints and frontend UI. All 19 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend Operations Readiness page renders correctly with 4 tabs and all interactive elements working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/operations/capability-matrix - Returns 4 suppliers (ratehawk, tbo, paximum, wwtatil) with all capability flags (search, price_check, hold, booking, cancel, sandbox_available)
POST /api/operations/validate-supplier - Validates single supplier credentials with steps: credential_check, authentication, search, price_check, hold
POST /api/operations/validate-all - Validates all 4 suppliers with summary status
POST /api/operations/cache-burst-test - Returns cache hit/miss counts and latency metrics
POST /api/operations/rate-limit-test - Returns allowed/rejected counts and rejection rate
GET /api/operations/fallback-test - Returns 4 scenarios with expected fallback chains, all_chains_correct=true
GET /api/operations/reconciliation-test - Returns reconciliation stats (total_records, price_mismatches, status_mismatches), booking counts, and commission coverage
GET /api/operations/monitoring-test - Returns checks for redis_healthy, scheduler_running, jobs_configured, supplier_metrics_active, etc.
GET /api/operations/launch-readiness - Returns platform_maturity_score (8.13/10), 7 dimension scores, operational_risks (4 items), launch_checklist (10 items), key_metrics
GET /api/operations/onboarding-checklist - Returns 6-step agency onboarding flow with endpoints and prerequisites
GET /api/operations/supplier-sla - Returns SLA metrics for all 4 suppliers including circuit_state
All endpoints properly require admin/super_admin roles (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 tabs render, all buttons work, maturity score displays)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing supplier capabilities config and mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: MEGA PROMPT #27 Live Operations & Market Readiness fully tested. Key features: 1) Operations page at /app/admin/operations-readiness with 4 tabs: Launch Raporu, Yetenek Matrisi, Dogrulama, Performans, 2) Platform maturity score 8.13/10 with 7 dimensions (supplier_integration=9.5, booking_engine=9.8, cache_performance=7.0, fallback_reliability=9.9, monitoring=5.7, reconciliation=7.0, revenue_tracking=8.0), 3) Capability Matrix shows 4 suppliers with capability icons, 4) Validation tab has 'Tum Supplier'lari Dogrula' button, 5) Performance tab has 3 test buttons (Cache Burst, Fallback, Rate Limit), 6) Operational risks documented (4 items with severity levels), 7) Launch checklist with 10 items and priorities, 8) Agency onboarding flow with 6 steps, 9) Navigation link 'Operasyon & Launch' exists in adminNav.js.

backend_apis.POST /api/operations/validate-all: PASS - Validates all 4 suppliers with summary

mocked_note: Supplier adapters use mock/test credentials - validation shows connection issues (expected behavior). Redis is running. APScheduler manages 5 background jobs. Capability matrix is static data from SUPPLIER_CAPABILITIES dict. Fallback chains are: ratehawk->[tbo,paximum], tbo->[ratehawk,paximum], paximum->[ratehawk,tbo], wwtatil->[tbo].
